languages.text: Вы распорядились отправить созданную Эоганном Триасомату нести почетную службу на офицерских палубах.
You sent the Triasomata created by Eogunn to serve honourably on the officer decks.
languages.original_text: Вы распорядились отправить созданную Эоганном Триасомату нести почетную службу на офицерских палубах.

traits.locale_text: You sent the Triasomata created by Eogunn to serve honourably on the officer decks.
You sent the Triasomata created by Eogunn to serve honourably on the officer decks.
You sent the Triasomata created by Eogunn to serve honourably on the officer decks.

languages.text: Enviaste el triasómata creado por Eogunn a trabajar con honor en las cubiertas de oficiales.
languages.original_text: You sent the Triasomata created by Eogunn to serve honourably on the officer decks.

traits.locale_text: Enviaste el triasómata creado por Eogunn a trabajar con honor en las cubiertas de oficiales.

languages.text: 你将伊奥贡创造的三相体送去军官甲板光荣服役。
languages.original_text: You sent the Triasomata created by Eogunn to serve honourably on the officer decks.

traits.locale_text: 你将伊奥贡创造的三相体送去军官甲板光荣服役。

languages.text: Vous avez envoyé le Triasomata créé par Eogunn aux ponts supérieurs afin qu'il serve aux côtés des officiers.
languages.original_text: You sent the Triasomata created by Eogunn to serve honourably on the officer decks.

traits.locale_text: Vous avez envoyé le Triasomata créé par Eogunn aux ponts supérieurs afin qu'il serve aux côtés des officiers.

languages.text: Eogunn'un yarattığı Üçyeköz'ü subay güvertesinde şerefle hizmet etmeye gönderdin.
languages.original_text: You sent the Triasomata created by Eogunn to serve honourably on the officer decks.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn'un yarattığı Üçyeköz'ü subay güvertesinde şerefle hizmet etmeye gönderdin.

languages.text: Du hast den von Eogunn geschaffenen Triasomata auf die Offiziersdecks geschickt.
languages.original_text: You sent the Triasomata created by Eogunn to serve honourably on the officer decks.

traits.locale_text: Du hast den von Eogunn geschaffenen Triasomata auf die Offiziersdecks geschickt.

languages.text: エオガンの作ったトライアスモータを、軍人たちのデッキで誠実に働かせた。
languages.original_text: You sent the Triasomata created by Eogunn to serve honourably on the officer decks.

traits.locale_text: エオガンの作ったトライアスモータを、軍人たちのデッキで誠実に働かせた。
